vibe: Bold, raw, edgy, gritty, anti-corporate, creator-economy hustle aesthetic.

rules.h1: text-6xl sm:text-7xl lg:text-8xl font-heading tracking-tight uppercase
rules.h2: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-heading tracking-tight uppercase

typography.install_instructions: Add Google Fonts imports for 'Bebas Neue', 'Outfit', and 'JetBrains Mono' to index.css

spacing_and_layout.generous_spacing: Use massive padding (py-24, py-32) for marketing sections.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Use asymmetrical grid layouts (col-span-8, col-span-4) in marketing. Use dense, rigid grids in the dashboard.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Prioritize left-alignment for brutalist tension. Avoid center-everything.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Expose the skeleton. Use grid borders (border-collapse, border-r, border-b border-zinc-800).

shadcn_ui.buttons: Flat background, sharp corners. Use hard solid drop shadows on hover for CTAs (e.g., hover:-translate-y-1 hover:-translate-x-1 hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#FFD600] transition-all duration-200).
shadcn_ui.cards: border-zinc-800 border bg-zinc-950 rounded-none. No soft drop shadows. Use 1px inner stroke.
shadcn_ui.inputs: bg-transparent border-zinc-800 rounded-none focus:border-yellow-400 focus:ring-0 text-white font-mono

icons.style: Sharp, technical, raw. Use stroke-width 1.5 or 2.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Invert colors (e.g., black bg/yellow text -> yellow bg/black text) for a harsh, instant feedback loop.
motion_and_interactions.marquees: Implement a fast kinetic marquee ('react-fast-marquee') with outline text (text-transparent stroke-white) for hype/energy on the landing page.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. High contrast focus rings (ring-2 ring-yellow-400 ring-offset-2 ring-offset-zinc-950).

hero_background.description: Man with braids working on computer with neon sign - Edgy Creator Vibe

studio_vibe.description: Professional creator recording setup - Content Studio reference

dark_texture_bg.description: Gritty concrete texture with diagonal light - Pricing or feature background

neon_cityscape.description: Rain-soaked street reflecting neon lights - Post scheduler mood image

landing_page.layout: Massive typography. Overlay hero image with heavy bg-zinc-950/70. Add a massive kinetic text marquee 'GO VIRAL OR GO BROKE'.
landing_page.features: Bento grid (Mode A) showcasing chaotic but controlled feature cards.

auth.layout: Split screen. Left: Gritty image with raw brand quote. Right: Brutalist login form with sharp inputs and yellow solid-shadow CTA button.

dashboard.layout: Control Room Grid (Mode B). Dense, functional, border-heavy. Sidebar nav with neon red active state.
dashboard.components: Usage stats widgets with raw progress bars (straight, no border-radius, bright yellow). Plan badge as a sharp tag.

content_studio.layout: Two-pane view. Left: Form inputs for AI generation (font-mono). Right: Generated viral scripts in a terminal-like window (bg-black, border-zinc-800, text-zinc-300).
content_studio.components: Include a 'Generate Viral Hook' button with high-contrast red styling.

post_scheduler.layout: Calendar/List view. Instead of soft rounded bubbles, use hard rectangular event blocks.
post_scheduler.components: Tabs for TikTok/IG/YT/Twitter/LinkedIn (use raw text or lucide icons, high contrast active state).

pricing.layout: 3-column CSS grid. Use dark concrete texture background.
tiers: Pro ($79) - Yellow border + 'HUSTLER' badge. Heavy solid yellow shadow.

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='generate-script-btn', data-testid='pricing-pro-tier').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use purely custom HTML/Tailwind for marketing layout (avoid Shadcn Cards there). Use heavily customized Shadcn for dashboard and forms. Erase all border-radius (rounded-none). Never use purple/teal. Stick to Void Black, White, Red, and Yellow. Implement the Google Fonts exactly as defined. Do NOT use placeholder URLs—use the provided media_urls.
